name: 默认语义识别登录（推荐）
description: 默认任务：语义识别账号、密码、运营商（下拉可选）并点击登录
author: Campus-Auth

steps.description: 语义识别账号输入框并填写
steps.script: (() => { const username = String('{{username}}' || '').trim(); if (!username) throw new Error('账号为空'); const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const editable = (el) => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const textOf = (el) => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels && el.labels[0] && el.labels[0].innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = (el) => { const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (type === 'text' || type === 'email' || type === 'tel' || type === '') s += 5; if (type === 'password' || type === 'hidden') s -= 20; const t = textOf(el); if (/账号|帳號|帐号|用户名|使用者|学号|工号|手机号|手机|user|username|login|id/.test(t)) s += 18; if (/密码|pass|验证码|code/.test(t)) s -= 8; return s; }; const fields = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')).filter((el) => visible(el) && editable(el)); const target = fields.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 1) throw new Error('未识别到账号输入框'); target.focus(); target.value = ''; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.value = username; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.description: 语义识别密码输入框并填写
steps.script: (() => { const password = String('{{password}}' || '').trim(); if (!password) throw new Error('密码为空'); const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const editable = (el) => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const textOf = (el) => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels && el.labels[0] && el.labels[0].innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = (el) => { const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (type === 'password') s += 24; const t = textOf(el); if (/密码|密碼|pass|passwd|pwd/.test(t)) s += 14; if (/账号|用户名|user|username/.test(t)) s -= 8; return s; }; const fields = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')).filter((el) => visible(el) && editable(el)); const target = fields.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 1) throw new Error('未识别到密码输入框'); target.focus(); target.value = ''; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.value = password; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.description: 语义识别运营商下拉框并选择（未识别到则跳过）
steps.script: (() => { const isp = String('{{isp}}' || '').trim(); if (!isp) return true; const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 1 && rect.height > 1; }; const normalize = (s) => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, '').toLowerCase(); const wanted = normalize(isp); const selects = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).filter(visible); const looksCarrier = (text) => /运营商|isp|carrier|套餐|网络|宽带|服务/.test(text); for (const sel of selects) { const selfText = normalize([sel.name, sel.id, sel.className, sel.getAttribute('aria-label')].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); const options = Array.from(sel.options || []); let best = null; let score = -999; for (const opt of options) { const text = normalize([opt.textContent, opt.label, opt.value].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s = 0; if (text.includes(wanted) || wanted.includes(text)) s += 30; if (looksCarrier(text)) s += 6; if (looksCarrier(selfText)) s += 4; if (s > score) { score = s; best = opt; } } if (best && score >= 10) { sel.value = best.value; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; } } return true; })()

steps.description: 语义识别并点击登录按钮
steps.script: (() => { const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const textOf = (el) => String((el.innerText || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '')).replace(/\s+/g, '').trim(); const score = (el) => { const text = textOf(el); let s = 0; if (text === '登录' || text === '登入') s += 40; if (/^登录$|^登入$|^用户登录$|^账号登录$/.test(text)) s += 30; if (/登录|登入|认证|连接网络|开始上网|上网/.test(text)) s += 18; if (/扫码|二维码|验证码登录|短信登录|微信|支付宝/.test(text)) s -= 25; if (/重置|取消|清空|退出|返回/.test(text)) s -= 16; const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); if (type === 'submit' || type === 'button') s += 4; return s; }; const nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, input[type=submit], input[type=button], a, div[role=button]')).filter(visible); const target = nodes.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 8) throw new Error('未找到可用登录按钮'); target.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const text = String((document.body && document.body.innerText) || '') + ' ' + String(document.title || ''); const okWords = ['登录成功', '认证成功', '已连接', '已上线', '欢迎', 'success', 'connected']; const badWords = ['失败', '错误', '无效', '密码错误', '账号错误', 'failed', 'error']; const has = (arr) => arr.some((w) => text.toLowerCase().includes(w.toLowerCase())); if (has(badWords)) return false; return has(okWords); })()

on_success.message: 登录成功（默认语义识别）

on_failure.message: 登录失败（默认语义识别）
